docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PAUL MURAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADAM GLICKMAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURAD, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLICKMAN, ADAM $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
